input_dict.question: In between J Puttanna Kanagal and John Cassavetes, who acted in many Hollywood films, notably "Rosemary's Baby"?
input_dict.target_summary: Integrated evidence: Puttanna Kanagal is an Indian filmmaker and is considered one of Kannada cinema's greatest filmmakers. John Nicholas Cassavetes was a Greek-American actor, film director, and screenwriter; he also acted in many Hollywood films, notably "Rosemary's Baby" (1968) and "The Dirty Dozen" (1967).
input_dict.candidate_summary: Puttanna Kanagal was an Indian filmmaker (Puttanna Kanagal). John Cassavetes was a Greek-American actor, film director, and screenwriter who acted in many Hollywood films, notably "Rosemary's Baby" (John Cassavetes); he is the person in the question who fits that description.
